ability.dynamite.name: Dynamite
ability.dynamite.desc: Grade I stores two charges with 108 damage and a 3.1 m radius. Grade II restores three charges with 150 damage and a 5.2 m radius. Each charge regenerates in 35 seconds.
ability.gravityWell.name: Gravity Well
ability.gravityWell.desc: Q throws a containment sphere that pulls enemies and the player inward before imploding. Recharges in 90 seconds.
ability.satelliteStrike.name: Satellite Strike
ability.satelliteStrike.desc: Q marks the aimed ground position for a delayed 6.5 m orbital beam. Deals half damage to bosses and recharges in 42 seconds.
ability.punchlineRush.desc: Press Q to charge 10 m, ignore damage during the rush, and push and stun enemies hit. Recharges in 17 seconds and does not consume stamina.
ability.supplyDrop.name: Supply Drop
ability.supplyDrop.desc: Q marks a delivery point. After 7 seconds, a 20 HP obstacle crate lands for 30 seconds. Destroy it for two ammo pickups and one health pickup. Recharges in 60 seconds.
ability.overtime.name: Overtime
ability.overtime.desc: Q spends 15 HP to restore 70 stamina. Cannot be used at full stamina or when it would leave less than 10 HP. Recharges in 12 seconds.
ability.engagementBait.name: Engagement Bait
ability.engagementBait.desc: Q deploys a 50 HP prop that distracts nearby non-boss enemies for up to 7 seconds. Its exit burst briefly staggers nearby enemies. Recharges in 45 seconds.
achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.secret.name: Secret Transmission
achievements.secret.desc: Keep broadcasting to reveal this achievement.
level.relay.name: Relay District
level.relay.signalRestored: Signal restored — district handoff in progress
level.spire.name: Sanitizer Spire
level.spire.destroyCommissioner: Destroy the suppression nodes, then the Commissioner
level.adzone.name: Ad-Zone Arena
level.adzone.destroyCaptain: Break all 3 Zeppelin pods, then defeat the Captain
level.adzone.liberating: Taking Ad-Zone Arena off the air
level.adzone.signalRestored: Sponsor feed severed — plaza handoff in progress
level.wastes.name: Trend Wastes
level.wastes.signalRestored: Storm-eye stabilized — route handoff in progress
level.freight.name: Freight Annex
level.freight.destroyBroodmaker: Break the infected machinery and destroy Broodmaker Prime
level.freight.routeRestored: Cargo route secured — annex handoff in progress
level.mirror.name: Mirror Garden
level.mirror.destroyHydraclone: Break the echo lineage and destroy Echo Hydraclone
level.mirror.routeRestored: Reflection loop stabilized — garden handoff in progress
level.court.name: Content Court
level.court.destroyAdjudicator: Clear Citation mines and overturn the Strike Adjudicator
level.court.authorityBroken: Bureau authority broken - court handoff in progress
level.cathedral.name: Server Cathedral
level.cathedral.destroyAlgorithm: Break Control, survive Paradox, and defeat The Algorithm
level.cathedral.algorithmReleased: The Algorithm is unbound - approach the final console
level.cathedral.chooseEndingDetail: Stand at FREE or RESET to commit the campaign ending
level.cathedral.freeChoice: FREE - hold to make the Algorithm guard plurality
level.cathedral.resetChoice: RESET - hold to return the network to the people
level.cathedral.freeConfirmed: The Algorithm is free - plurality has a guardian
level.cathedral.resetConfirmed: The network is reset - the people inherit its power
level.lastOrder.name: Base Transit — Dead Zone
level.lastOrder.escapeDetail: RUN — reach the signal dead zone; these units cannot be stopped
level.lastOrder.powerdownDetail: SIGNAL LOST — local units exhausting reserve power
level.expanse.name: Sandstorm Expanse
level.expanse.monumentOnline: The endurance relay is online - returning to the hub
level.floodgate.name: Floodgate Continuity
level.floodgate.holdOverrideDetail: Hold the Greywater master override through the deluge
wave72.searchlight: Final surge: the Last Light has found the Warden
level.cistern.name: Blackout Cistern
level.cistern.warningDetail: Surge {surge}/{total} incoming · return to the light
level.cistern.completeDetail: Full lighting restored · Greywater's escaped seed has been traced
hud.desktopHelp: WASD move • Mouse aim • Click shoot • R reload • Shift sprint • C crouch • Space jump • P pause
offer.title: Armory Offer
offer.sidearmSelect: Choose a permanent backup for this run.
archive.title: Punchline Archive
archive.copy: Unlock survival mutations for the run progression pool, build weapon mastery, and decrypt classified gear. Mutation ranks reset every run.
classified.hidden.name: Classified Weapon
classified.progress.tacticalReady: Tactical Slot 3 ready — choose one equipped tool
classified.revealToast: CLASSIFIED WEAPON DECRYPTED: {weapon}. Purchase its license in the Archive for Armory access.
classified.rifle.name: Rifle License
classified.rifle.desc: Permanently adds the Rifle to future Armory offers. Focus Lens remains a separate optional upgrade.
classified.rifle.reveal: Reach Wave 6 to decrypt this weapon.
classified.rifle.revealed: Decrypted after reaching Wave 6 — purchase the license for Armory access.
classified.dmr.name: DMR License
classified.dmr.desc: Permanently adds the DMR to future Armory offers. Longform Scope remains a separate optional upgrade.
classified.dmr.reveal: Defeat the Wave 10 boss to decrypt this weapon.
classified.dmr.revealed: Decrypted by defeating the Wave 10 boss — purchase the license for Armory access.
classified.grenade.name: Grenade Launcher — Slot 3
classified.grenade.desc: Permanently adds a dedicated third inventory slot with its own Grenade Launcher and ammunition pool.
classified.grenade.reveal: Defeat the Wave 15 boss to decrypt this weapon package.
classified.grenade.revealed: Decrypted by defeating the Wave 15 boss — purchase for permanent Slot 3 access.
classified.dynamite.name: Analog Solution — Slot 3
classified.dynamite.desc: A two-grade Q ability. Grade I stores two focused charges; Grade II restores three stronger, wider charges. Every charge uses a 2.6-second fuse and 35-second recharge.
classified.dynamite.reveal: Defeat the Wave 20 boss to decrypt this contraband package.
defeat.title: The feed went dark.
mutation.offer.title: Punchline Mutation
mutation.offer.select: Choose one run upgrade. All ranks reset when the broadcast ends.
mutation.armor.name: Irony Armor
mutation.armor.desc: Adds an ablative layer that absorbs damage before health.
mutation.stamina.name: Extended Bit
mutation.stamina.desc: Extends maximum stamina without changing its costs or recovery.
mutation.smgSidearm.name: Backup Broadcast
mutation.smgSidearm.desc: A one-rank run mutation: replaces the Slot 2 Pistol with an SMG. The primary slot remains open; if selected before Wave 2, progression grants a Shotgun instead of another SMG.
mutation.health.name: Main Character Energy
mutation.health.desc: Raises maximum health by 2 and restores 1 HP per run rank.
mutation.callback.name: Callback
mutation.callback.desc: Every eighth elimination releases a non-damaging shockwave from you that pushes nearby enemies. Bosses are immune.
mutation.confetti.name: Overkill Confetti
mutation.confetti.desc: Makes every tenth regular-enemy elimination a celebration. Grade II restores 1 HP and Grade III restores 2 HP.
mutation.roulette.name: Algorithm Roulette
mutation.roulette.desc: Every seventh eligible sky shot can produce one verdict per wave. Grade I is fair, Grade II favors recovery, and Grade III neutralizes the first loss in each boss cycle.
mutation.roulette.value.grade3: Grade II odds · first loss per boss cycle is neutral
mutation.openingAct.name: Opening Act
mutation.openingAct.desc: Gives the first regular enemy defeated each wave a launched, spinning stage death. Grade II strengthens the launch and Grade III pauses combo decay for 3 seconds.
mutation.openingAct.value.grade1: First elimination · launch and stage cue
mutation.openingAct.value.grade3: Stronger launch · combo held for 3 s
mutation.finalCut.name: Final Cut
mutation.finalCut.desc: Gives the final regular enemy of each wave a cinematic hang and directed fall. Grade II adds advanced variants; Grade III restores 10 stamina and protects combo decay for 3 seconds.
mutation.finalCut.value.grade3: Advanced variants · +10 stamina · combo held 3 s
mutation.rush.name: Punchline Rush
mutation.rush.desc: Press Q at full stamina to charge 10 m, ignore damage during the rush, and push and stun enemies hit. Drains all stamina and delays recovery.
mutation.rifleFocus.name: Rifle — Focus Lens
mutation.rifleFocus.desc: Permanently enables the Rifle's 1.5× right-click zoom. The Rifle remains fully usable without it.
mutation.dmrScope.name: DMR — Longform Scope
mutation.dmrScope.desc: Permanently enables the DMR's 3× right-click scope for deliberate long-range shots.
mutation.backgroundSync.name: Background Sync
mutation.backgroundSync.desc: A one-rank run mutation: while your primary is below half ammo, regenerate 5% of its unupgraded base reserve every 10 active seconds. Pistol, Grenade, and Beam Saber are excluded.
mutation.deepReserves.name: Deep Reserves
mutation.deepReserves.desc: Raises every weapon's hard reserve limit by 30% of its unupgraded base reserve per run rank. Does not increase Background Sync's regeneration rate.
mutation.progress.permanentReady: Available from the beginning of every future run
mutation.progress.bossReady: Defeat this boss to choose your first Punchline Mutation.
mutation.progress.archiveUnlocked: Survival mutations decoded — now purchasable in the Archive.
mutation.progress.archiveUnlockedEarly: Irony Armor, Extended Bit, and Backup Broadcast decoded — now purchasable in the Archive.
mutation.progress.archiveUnlockedAdvance: Main Character Energy, Callback, Background Sync, and Deep Reserves decoded — now purchasable in the Archive.
mutation.progress.waveGate: Defeat the Wave {wave} boss to make this mutation purchasable.
mutation.progress.poolPurchase: Unlock once to add Ranks 1–{rank} to future run offers from Wave 1.
mutation.progress.poolReady: Ranks 1–{rank} can appear in run offers from Wave 1 and reset after every run.
mastery.smg.name: SMG — Extended Magazine
mastery.smg.desc: Adds four magazine rounds per grade. Reserve ammunition and damage stay unchanged.
mastery.smgDamage.name: SMG — Hotter Feed
mastery.smgDamage.desc: Raises all SMG bullet damage by 5% per grade. Magazine and fire rate stay unchanged.
mastery.rifle.name: Rifle — Field Magazine
mastery.rifle.desc: Adds two magazine rounds per grade. Reserve ammunition and damage stay unchanged.
mastery.rifleDamage.name: Rifle — High-Caliber Rounds
mastery.rifleDamage.desc: Raises all Rifle bullet damage by 5% per grade. Magazine and fire rate stay unchanged.
mastery.pistol.name: Pistol — Sharper Punchline
mastery.pistol.desc: Raises all pistol damage by 5% per grade while preserving its precision role.
mastery.dmr.name: DMR — Follow-up Chamber
mastery.dmr.desc: Adds one round per grade without increasing reserve ammunition.
mastery.shotgun.name: Shotgun — Denser Payload
mastery.shotgun.desc: Adds 0.5 base damage to every pellet per grade; spread and cadence stay unchanged.
mastery.minigun.name: Minigun — Feed Overdrive
mastery.minigun.desc: Each grade adds 40 magazine rounds, 10% damage, tighter spread, and a larger starting reserve.
mastery.beamsaber.name: Beam Saber — Double Take
mastery.beamsaber.desc: Grade I replaces the charged slash with a fast two-hit alternate combo. Later grades improve its damage.
start.tagline: Meme-fueled shooter. Hijack feeds, raise hype, roast the Bureau.
start.tipDesktop: Click Play, then click to lock the mouse.
start.tipMobile: Tap Play to start. Drag to look.
playtime.label: Time played
level.tutorial.name: ALGORITHM BLIND ROOM
tutorial.walk: Walk to the cyan floor marker
tutorial.shoot: Fire the Pistol at the red plate
tutorial.obstacles: Move around cover to the green marker
tutorial.crate: Open the yellow crate with two Pistol right-click strikes
tutorial.grunt: Defeat the Grunt with your Pistol
tutorial.hideShooter: Break the Shooter's sightline and hold behind cover
tutorial.finalRifle: Rifle issued: defeat all three Grunts
tutorial.headshot: Shoot the grunt in the head
tutorial.sidearm: Sidearms live in slot 2. Press 2 and fire it
tutorial.primary: Press 1 to switch back to your primary and fire
tutorial.noammo: No ammo! Reload and try again
tutorial.completeReady: You completed the training. Ready for the real game?
pause.title: Paused
pause.copy: Take a breath. The arena will wait.
settings.title: Settings
settings.supportLogsHint: Records performance and errors locally; nothing is sent automatically. It does not enable debug tools. Changing this restarts the game.
settings.resetHint: Erase all saved settings, progress, achievements, and local game data.
settings.resetConfirmText: This permanently erases your settings, progress, achievements, and local game data. This cannot be undone.
debugLog.title: Support log events
debugLog.copyFailed: Could not copy the diagnostic report.
editor.title: Quarantine of Joy — Level Editor
export.pageTitle: Quarantine of Joy — Export Assets to GLB
export.title: Export Procedural Assets → GLB
export.name: Name
musicPlayer.title: Music Library Player
ach.firstBlood.name: First Blood
ach.monsterHunter.name: Monster Hunter
ach.rookieScore.name: Rookie
ach.veteranScore.name: Veteran
ach.primeTime.name: Prime Time
ach.waveBeginner.name: The Journey Starts
ach.waveMaster.name: Wave Master
ach.collector.name: Collector
ach.arsenal.name: Arsenal
ach.speedRunner.name: Speed Runner
ach.speedRunner.desc: Finish a wave in under 30 seconds.
ach.survivor.name: Survivor
ach.cleanFeed.name: Clean Feed
ach.cleanFeed.desc: Clear a full wave without taking damage.
ach.goingViral.name: Going Viral
ach.headlineMaterial.name: Headline Material
ach.headlineMaterial.desc: Land 10 headshot kills during one wave.
ach.breakTheBureau.name: Break the Bureau
ach.stillBroadcasting.name: Still Broadcasting
ach.stillBroadcasting.desc: Reach Wave 20 in a single run.
ach.termsOfEngagement.name: Terms of Engagement
ach.termsOfEngagement.desc: Clear 5 consecutive full waves dealing damage only with the BeamSaber.
ach.termsAndConditionsApply.name: Terms and Conditions Apply
ach.termsAndConditionsApply.desc: Clear 10 consecutive full waves dealing damage only with the Shotgun.
ach.lastWord.name: Last Word
ach.lastWord.desc: Kill the final enemy of a wave with the final round in your magazine.
ach.untouchable.name: Untouchable
ach.untouchable.desc: Defeat a boss without taking damage after it spawns.
ach.streetSweeper.name: Street Sweeper
ach.cutTheFeed.name: Cut the Feed
ach.replyAll.name: Reply All
ach.replyAll.desc: Defeat 3 enemies with one Shotgun blast.
ach.rapidResponse.name: Rapid Response
ach.rapidResponse.desc: Clear a non-boss wave in under 20 seconds.
ach.fullSpectrum.name: Full Spectrum
ach.fullSpectrum.desc: Use all 7 core weapons at least once.
ach.defaultSettings.name: Default Settings
ach.defaultSettings.desc: Clear Waves 1–5 dealing damage only with the Pistol.
ach.noTimeToBuffer.name: No Time to Buffer
ach.noTimeToBuffer.desc: Clear a wave with an ammo weapon without reloading.
ach.hotMic.name: Hot Mic
ach.hotMic.desc: Defeat 15 enemies before the maximum combo expires.
ach.factChecker.name: Fact Checker
ach.factChecker.desc: Defeat the Hydraclone before its lineage reaches generation 3.
ach.allWeatherAudience.name: All-Weather Audience
ach.allWeatherAudience.desc: Clear a wave in every weather mode.
ach.engagementBait.name: Engagement Bait
ach.engagementBait.desc: Clear a wave started at 25 HP or less without healing.
ach.adFreeExperience.name: Ad-Free Experience
ach.adFreeExperience.desc: Clear 5 consecutive waves without collecting a pickup.
ach.omnichannel.name: Omnichannel
ach.omnichannel.desc: Defeat 50 enemies with each of the 7 core weapons.
ach.threePartExpose.name: Three-Part Exposé
ach.remoteWork.name: Remote Work
ach.remoteWork.desc: Score a DMR headshot kill from at least 25 metres.
ach.algorithmicBoost.name: Algorithmic Boost
ach.algorithmicBoost.desc: Defeat 10 enemies with the Minigun within 5 seconds.
ach.massUnfollow.name: Mass Unfollow
ach.contentHoarder.name: Content Hoarder
ach.endlessBarrage.name: Endless Barrage
ach.firstCancellation.name: First Cancellation
ach.unkillableIsh.name: Unkillable-ish
ach.damageControl.name: Damage Control
ach.openTheFiles.name: Open the Files
ach.openTheFiles.desc: Open the Punchline Archive for the first time.
ach.paperTrail.name: Paper Trail
ach.paperTrail.desc: Make 3 purchases in the Punchline Archive.
ach.masterCopy.name: Master Copy
ach.masterCopy.desc: Raise any Archive upgrade to Grade III.
ach.fragmented.name: Fragmented
ach.fragmented.desc: Recover 25 Archive fragments across your career.
ach.executiveFunction.name: Executive Function
ach.executiveFunction.desc: Defeat 5 enemies with one damaging ability activation.
ach.appliedResearch.name: Applied Research
ach.controlledDemolition.name: Controlled Demolition
ach.controlledDemolition.desc: Defeat 100 enemies with damaging abilities. Reward: permanently unlock the Grenade Launcher.
ach.hostileTakeover.name: Hostile Takeover
ach.hostileTakeover.desc: Defeat the Wave 15 boss without taking damage during the fight. Reward: permanently unlock the Grenade Launcher.
ach.baitAndSwitch.name: Bait and Switch
ach.baitAndSwitch.desc: Draw the attention of 8 different enemies with one Engagement Bait.
ach.eventHorizon.name: Event Horizon
ach.eventHorizon.desc: Defeat 8 enemies with one Gravity Well.
ach.specialDelivery.name: Special Delivery
ach.specialDelivery.desc: Break open a Supply Drop while at 25 HP or less.
ach.archiveAuthority.name: Archive Authority
ach.archiveAuthority.desc: Own at least one unlock from every Archive category.
ach.fullClearance.name: Full Clearance
ach.finalDraft.name: Final Draft
ach.finalDraft.desc: Reach maximum grade on 5 different permanent upgrades.
ach.cleanSweep.name: Clean Sweep
ach.cleanSweep.desc: Defeat the Wave 5, 10, and 15 bosses without taking boss-fight damage in one run.
ach.blackBudget.name: Black Budget
ach.blackBudget.desc: Invest 120 fragments in Archive upgrades. Reward: permanently unlock the Grenade Launcher.
